content.thinking: Let me fetch the content of that URL.

input.prompt: What is written on this page?

content.content:
# Summary of Page Content

This is a humorous French webpage titled "Vous Etes Perdu?" (Are You Lost?). The page addresses lost internet users with the reassuring message "Pas de panique, on va vous aider" ("Don't panic, we're going to help you"). 

The main feature is a simple ASCII diagram with an arrow pointing to an asterisk, labeled "vous êtes ici" (you are here), which humorously suggests the reader is at this exact location on the internet—implying they've stumbled upon this minimal, helpful page while browsing.

The overall tone is lighthearted and self-aware, acknowledging that internet users sometimes end up on unexpected pages.

This is a humorous French webpage titled "Vous Etes Perdu?" (Are You Lost?). The page addresses lost internet users with the reassuring message "Pas de panique, on va vous aider" ("Don't panic, we're going to help you"). 

The main feature is a simple ASCII diagram with an arrow pointing to an asterisk, labeled "vous êtes ici" (you are here), which humorously suggests the reader is at this exact location on the internet—implying they've stumbled upon this minimal, helpful page while browsing.

The overall tone is lighthearted and self-aware, acknowledging that internet users sometimes end up on unexpected pages.

content.text:
Here's what is written on [perdu.com](https://perdu.com):

- **Title:** "Vous Etes Perdu?" *(Are You Lost?)*
- **Subtitle/message:** "Pas de panique, on va vous aider" *(Don't panic, we're going to help you)*
- **ASCII diagram:** A simple arrow pointing to an asterisk (`*`), labeled **"vous êtes ici"** *(you are here)*

It's a classic, minimalist French humor page — a lighthearted joke for anyone who stumbles upon it while lost on the internet.
